description_long: This is a set of two wooden filing cabinets, one larger and one smaller, both featuring a rich, dark brown finish and sleek, minimalist design. The larger cabinet has four wide drawers stacked vertically, while the smaller unit has a single drawer, both supported by slender black metal legs. The drawer fronts are flat and unadorned, with subtle, recessed pull grooves instead of protruding handles, giving the cabinets a modern, streamlined appearance. Small keyholes are visible on the drawer faces, indicating the presence of a locking mechanism for secure storage. The surfaces are smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light gently. These cabinets are well-suited for organizing documents or personal items in a professional or residential setting.
description: A modern, dark brown wooden filing cabinet set with sleek black legs and recessed pull grooves, featuring secure locking drawers. The set includes a large four-drawer unit and a smaller single-drawer unit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four wide drawers of the large cabinet and the single drawer of the smaller unit, both with recessed pull grooves and keyholes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and rectangular profile of both cabinets, with the smaller unit positioned in front of the larger one.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned wooden backs of both cabinets, with no visible handles or keyholes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wood panel and the slender black legs, with no drawer details visible.
